title: Arul Neram
desc: Priests and devotees in various temples conduct sacred rituals and prayers to praise and worship deities in the Hindu faith.

title: Mahisasura Marthni
desc: The defeat of an evil monster is narrated in a renowned devotional song about Goddess Durga, written by Guru Adi Shankaracharya.

title: Vishnu Sahasranama
desc: Religious leaders conduct sacred rituals and recite hymns in praise of Lord Vishnu to invoke his blessings and guide devotees towards spiritualism.

title: Lalitha Sahasranamam
desc: Religious leaders recite a sacred hymn containing the thousand names of Goddess Lalita, a revered Hindu deity, as an act of worship and devotion.

title: Kangathara Sothiram
desc: A rendering of Kanakadhara Stotram, a hymn dedicated to Goddess Mahalakshmi, is played in order to invoke the spirit of devotion.

title: Kandhashasti
desc: Religious leaders perform rituals and devotees gather to offer their prayers to Lord Kartikeya on the auspicious occasion of Kanda Sashti.

title: Ayyappan Special Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of melodious devotional songs dedicated to Lord Ayyappan, a Hindu deity, is played back-to-back.
